---
title: "Project 2"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
## Reproducibility

This analysis requires the following R packages:
data.table, dplyr, survival, survminer, cowplot.

If needed, install them via:
install.packages(c("dplyr", "data.table", "survival", "survminer", "cowplot"))

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(cowplot)
set.seed(629)
```


```{r}
MSK_CHORD_url <- "https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/cBioPortal/datahub/refs/heads/master/public/msk_chord_2024/"
```

```{r}
read_msk <- function(filename){
  read.delim(
    paste0(MSK_CHORD_url, filename),
    comment.char = "#",
    stringsAsFactors = TRUE
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Clinical and genomics files
clinical_patient <- read_msk("data_clinical_patient.txt")
clinical_sample <- read_msk("data_clinical_sample.txt")
CNA <- read_msk("data_cna.txt")

#timeline files
diagnosis <- read_msk("data_timeline_diagnosis.txt")
treatment <- read_msk("data_timeline_treatment.txt")
#progression <- read_msk("data_timeline_progression.txt")
tumor_site <- read_msk("data_timeline_tumor_sites.txt")
```


```{r}
# Data Preprocessing
clinical_patient_filtered <- clinical_patient |>
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    OS_MONTHS,
    OS_STATUS,
    CURRENT_AGE_DEID,
    GENDER,
    STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED
  ) |>
  mutate(
    PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
    GENDER = as.character(GENDER),
    STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED = as.character(STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED),
    OS_EVENT = as.integer(OS_STATUS == "1:DECEASED")
  ) |>
  filter(GENDER != "Unknown")

clinical_sample_filtered <- clinical_sample |>
  select(
    SAMPLE_ID,
    PATIENT_ID,
    CANCER_TYPE,
    SAMPLE_TYPE
  ) |>
  mutate(
    SAMPLE_ID = as.character(SAMPLE_ID),
    PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
    CANCER_TYPE = as.character(CANCER_TYPE),
    SAMPLE_TYPE = as.character(SAMPLE_TYPE)
  )

# We use the sample with sample type Primary for each patient, if no, local recurrence, then metastasis
colnames(CNA)[-1] <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(CNA)[-1])

clinical_sample_one <- clinical_sample_filtered |>
  mutate(priority = case_when(
    SAMPLE_TYPE == "Primary" ~ 1,
    SAMPLE_TYPE == "Local Recurrence" ~ 2,
    SAMPLE_TYPE == "Metastasis" ~ 3,
    TRUE ~ 4
  )) |>
  arrange(PATIENT_ID, priority) |>
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) |>
  slice(1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(SAMPLE_ID %in% colnames(CNA)) |> #6 samples removed
  mutate(CANCER_TYPE = as.character(CANCER_TYPE))

CNA_selected <- CNA[,c("Hugo_Symbol", clinical_sample_one$SAMPLE_ID), drop = FALSE]

diagnosis_summary <- diagnosis |>
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID)) |>
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) |>
  summarise(
    DIAGNOSIS_DATE = min(START_DATE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#progression_td <- progression |>
#  select(
#    PATIENT_ID,
#    START_DATE,
#    PROGRESSION
#  ) |>
#  filter(PROGRESSION == "Y") |>
#  left_join(diagnosis_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |> 
#  mutate(
#    time = (START_DATE - DIAGNOSIS_DATE) / 30.44
#  ) |>
#  filter(!is.na(time), time >= 0) |>
#  group_by(PATIENT_ID) |>
#  summarise(
#    time = min(time),
#    .groups = "drop"
#  )

treatment_td <- treatment |>
  select(
    PATIENT_ID,
    START_DATE,
    SUBTYPE
  ) |>
  mutate(
    PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
    SUBTYPE = as.character(SUBTYPE),
    TYPE = case_when(
      SUBTYPE == "Chemo" ~ "CHEMO",
      SUBTYPE == "Hormone" ~ "HORMONE",
      SUBTYPE == "Targeted" ~ "TARGETED",
      SUBTYPE == "Biologic" ~ "BIOLOGIC",
      TRUE ~ "ALL_OTHER"
    ),
    CHEMO = as.integer(TYPE == "CHEMO"),
    HORMONE = as.integer(TYPE == "HORMONE"),
    TARGETED = as.integer(TYPE == "TARGETED"),
    BIOLOGIC = as.integer(TYPE == "BIOLOGIC"),
    ALL_OTHER = as.integer(TYPE == "ALL_OTHER")
  ) |>
  group_by(PATIENT_ID, START_DATE) |>
  summarise(
    CHEMO = max(CHEMO),
    HORMONE = max(HORMONE),
    TARGETED = max(TARGETED),
    BIOLOGIC = max(BIOLOGIC),
    ALL_OTHER = max(ALL_OTHER),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(PATIENT_ID, START_DATE) |>
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) |>
  mutate(
    CHEMO = cummax(CHEMO),
    HORMONE = cummax(HORMONE),
    TARGETED = cummax(TARGETED),
    BIOLOGIC = cummax(BIOLOGIC),
    ALL_OTHER = cummax(ALL_OTHER)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
  
tumor_site_summary <- tumor_site |>
  group_by(PATIENT_ID) |>
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID)) |>
  summarise(
    Number_Tumor_Sites = n_distinct(TUMOR_SITE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
# Static patient level dataset
Analysis_static <- clinical_patient_filtered |>
  left_join(clinical_sample_one, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  left_join(diagnosis_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  left_join(tumor_site_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  mutate(
    Number_Tumor_Sites = ifelse(is.na(Number_Tumor_Sites), 0, Number_Tumor_Sites)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(CURRENT_AGE_DEID))
```


```{r}
# Gene level CNA information
valid_samples <- as.character(clinical_sample_one$SAMPLE_ID)
CNA_matrix <- as.matrix(CNA_selected[ , valid_samples, drop = FALSE])
colnames(CNA_matrix) <- valid_samples
rownames(CNA_matrix) <- as.character(CNA_selected$Hugo_Symbol)
X_CNA <- t(CNA_matrix)
X_CNA_binary <- (X_CNA != 0) * 1
X_CNA_binary[is.na(X_CNA_binary)] <- 0
# For model stability, we use binary(altered, not altered)
gene_frequency <- colMeans(X_CNA_binary, na.rm = TRUE)
top_10_genes_idx <- order(gene_frequency, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]
top_10_genes <- colnames(X_CNA_binary)[top_10_genes_idx]
X_CNA_top <- X_CNA_binary[, top_10_genes, drop = FALSE]

CNA_df <- data.frame(
  X_CNA_top,
  check.names = FALSE
)
CNA_df <- cbind(SAMPLE_ID = valid_samples, CNA_df)
CNA_df$SAMPLE_ID <- as.character(CNA_df$SAMPLE_ID)
colnames(CNA_df)[-1] <- make.names(colnames(CNA_df)[-1])

top_10_genes <- make.names(top_10_genes)

CNA_patient <- clinical_sample_one |>
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
         SAMPLE_ID = as.character(SAMPLE_ID)) |>
  select(PATIENT_ID, SAMPLE_ID) |>
  left_join(CNA_df, by = "SAMPLE_ID")

Analysis_static <- Analysis_static |>
  left_join(
    CNA_patient |> select(-SAMPLE_ID),
    by = "PATIENT_ID"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(all_of(top_10_genes), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), 0, .)))
```



```{r}
# Treatment, time dependent variable
treatment_time_depend <- treatment_td |>
  left_join(diagnosis_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  left_join(Analysis_static %>% select(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS), by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  mutate(
    time = (START_DATE - DIAGNOSIS_DATE) / 30.44
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(time), time >= 0, time <= OS_MONTHS) |> # Use Diagnosis date as the baseline time
  select(PATIENT_ID, time, CHEMO, HORMONE, TARGETED, BIOLOGIC, ALL_OTHER)

base_dataset <- Analysis_static |>
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID)) |>
  select(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT)

time_depend_data <- tmerge(
  data1 = base_dataset,
  data2 = base_dataset,
  id = PATIENT_ID,
  death = event(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT)
)

time_depend_data <- tmerge(
  time_depend_data,
  treatment_time_depend,
  id = PATIENT_ID,
  CHEMO = tdc(time, CHEMO, init = 0),
  HORMONE = tdc(time, HORMONE, init = 0),
  BIOLOGIC = tdc(time, BIOLOGIC, init = 0),
  TARGETED = tdc(time, TARGETED, init = 0),
  ALL_OTHER = tdc(time, ALL_OTHER, init = 0)
)

#time_depend_data <- tmerge(
#  time_depend_data,
#  progression_td,
#  id = PATIENT_ID,
#  PROGRESSION = tdc(time, 1, init = 0)
#)

time_depend_data <- time_depend_data |>
  left_join(
    Analysis_static |> select(-OS_MONTHS, -OS_EVENT),
    by = "PATIENT_ID"
  )
```



```{r}
# base model(only clinical)
cox_base <- coxph(Surv(tstart, tstop, death) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + 
                  STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites +strata(CANCER_TYPE), 
                  data = time_depend_data,
                  cluster = PATIENT_ID)
#summary(cox_base)
```


```{r}
# Static cox model
cox_treat <- coxph(
      Surv(tstart, tstop, death) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites + CHEMO + HORMONE
      + TARGETED + BIOLOGIC + ALL_OTHER + strata(CANCER_TYPE),
      data = time_depend_data, cluster = PATIENT_ID
)

#summary(cox_treat)
```

```{r}
# Time dependent model
cox_gene <- coxph(
  as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(tstart, tstop, death) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites +",
      "CHEMO + HORMONE + TARGETED + BIOLOGIC + ALL_OTHER +",
      paste(top_10_genes, collapse = " + "),
      "+ strata(CANCER_TYPE)"
    )
  ),
  data = time_depend_data,
  cluster = PATIENT_ID
)
```

```{r}
#summary(cox_base)$concordance
#summary(cox_treat)$concordance
#summary(cox_gene)$concordance
```

```{r}
#AIC(cox_base, cox_treat, cox_gene)
#BIC(cox_base, cox_treat, cox_gene)
```

```{r}
#| label: model-performance-table

aic_tab <- AIC(cox_base, cox_treat, cox_gene)
bic_tab <- BIC(cox_base, cox_treat, cox_gene)

c_base  <- summary(cox_base)$concordance
c_treat <- summary(cox_treat)$concordance
c_gene  <- summary(cox_gene)$concordance

model_perf <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Base", "Treatment", "CNA"),
  df = aic_tab$df,
  C_index = round(c(c_base[1], c_treat[1], c_gene[1]), 3),
  SE = round(c(c_base[2], c_treat[2], c_gene[2]), 4),
  AIC = round(aic_tab$AIC, 1),
  Delta_AIC = round(aic_tab$AIC[1] - aic_tab$AIC, 1),
  BIC = round(bic_tab$BIC, 1),
  Delta_BIC = round(bic_tab$BIC[1] - bic_tab$BIC, 1)
)

knitr::kable(model_perf, caption = "Comparison of model performance across Cox models")
```


```{r}
# Static mode for KM curve and risk stratification: age + gender + stage + CNA + number of tumor sites
cox_km_gene_sites <- coxph(
  as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites +",
      paste(top_10_genes, collapse = " + ")
    )
  ),
  data = Analysis_static
)
```

```{r}
Analysis_static_gene_sites <- Analysis_static |>
  mutate(risk_score_gene_sites = predict(cox_km_gene_sites, type = "lp"))

risk_cutoff_gene_sites <- median(Analysis_static_gene_sites$risk_score_gene_sites, na.rm = TRUE)
Analysis_static_gene_sites <- Analysis_static_gene_sites |>
  mutate(risk_group_gene_sites = ifelse(risk_score_gene_sites > risk_cutoff_gene_sites, "High risk", "Low risk"))
```

```{r}
if(!dir.exists("./Figures")) dir.create("./Figures")
```

```{r}
#| label: KM_Curve_of_gene_model_with_tumor_sites
# Kaplan-Meier Curve
km_fit_gene_sites <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_gene_sites, data = Analysis_static_gene_sites)

p1 <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit_gene_sites,
  data = Analysis_static_gene_sites,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "Risk group",
  legend.labs = c("High risk", "Low risk"),
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Survival probability",
  title = "Kaplan-Meier curves by CNA-based risk stratification (adjusted for tumor sites)",
  facet.by = "CANCER_TYPE"
) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25))

ggsave("./Figures/KM_gene_sites.png", plot = p1, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: log-rank-gene-sites-table
# Log-rank test
#survdiff(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_gene_sites, data = Analysis_static_gene_sites)
lr_gene_sites <- survdiff(
  Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_gene_sites,
  data = Analysis_static_gene_sites
)

logrank_table <- data.frame(
  Group = names(lr_gene_sites$n),
  N = as.numeric(lr_gene_sites$n),
  Observed = as.numeric(lr_gene_sites$obs),
  Expected = round(as.numeric(lr_gene_sites$exp), 0),
  OE2_E = round((lr_gene_sites$obs - lr_gene_sites$exp)^2 / lr_gene_sites$exp, 0)
)

knitr::kable(
  logrank_table,
  caption = paste0(
    "Log-rank test for gene-based risk groups adjusted for tumor sites. Chi-square = ",
    round(lr_gene_sites$chisq, 1),
    ", p < 2e-16."
  )
)
```

```{r}
# Static mode for KM curve and risk stratification: age + gender + stage + CNA
cox_km_gene_nosites <- coxph(
  as.formula(
    paste(
      "Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED +",
      paste(top_10_genes, collapse = " + ")
    )
  ),
  data = Analysis_static
)
```

```{r}
Analysis_static_gene_nosites <- Analysis_static |>
  mutate(risk_score_gene_nosites = predict(cox_km_gene_nosites, type = "lp"))

risk_cutoff_gene_nosites <- median(Analysis_static_gene_nosites$risk_score_gene_nosites, na.rm = TRUE)
Analysis_static_gene_nosites <- Analysis_static_gene_nosites |>
  mutate(risk_group_gene_nosites = ifelse(risk_score_gene_nosites > risk_cutoff_gene_nosites, "High risk", "Low risk"))
```

```{r}
#| label: KM_Curve_of_gene_model_without_tumor_sites
# Kaplan-Meier Curve
km_fit_gene_nosites <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_gene_nosites, data = Analysis_static_gene_nosites)

p2 <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit_gene_nosites,
  data = Analysis_static_gene_nosites,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "Risk group",
  legend.labs = c("High risk", "Low risk"),
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Survival probability",
  title = "Kaplan-Meier curves by CNA-based risk stratification (without tumor sites)",
  facet.by = "CANCER_TYPE"
) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25))

ggsave("./Figures/KM_gene_nosites.png", plot = p2, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
# cox km base: no CNA
cox_km_base_sites <- coxph(
    Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites,
    data = Analysis_static
)
```

```{r}
Analysis_static_base_sites <- Analysis_static |>
  mutate(risk_score_base_sites = predict(cox_km_base_sites, type = "lp"))

risk_cutoff_base_sites <- median(Analysis_static_base_sites$risk_score_base_sites, na.rm = TRUE)
Analysis_static_base_sites <- Analysis_static_base_sites |>
  mutate(risk_group_base_sites = ifelse(risk_score_base_sites > risk_cutoff_base_sites, "High risk", "Low risk"))
```

```{r}
#| label: KM_Curve_of_base_model_with_tumor_sites
# Kaplan-Meier Curve
km_fit_base_sites <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_base_sites, data = Analysis_static_base_sites)

p3 <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit_base_sites,
  data = Analysis_static_base_sites,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "Risk group",
  legend.labs = c("High risk", "Low risk"),
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Survival probability",
  title = "Kaplan-Meier curves by base risk stratification (adjusted for tumor sites)",
  facet.by = "CANCER_TYPE"
) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25))

ggsave("./Figures/KM_base_sites.png", plot = p3, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: log-rank-base-sites-table
# Log-rank test
#survdiff(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_base_sites, data = Analysis_static_base_sites)
lr_base_sites <- survdiff(
  Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_base_sites,
  data = Analysis_static_base_sites
)

logrank_base_table <- data.frame(
  Group = names(lr_base_sites$n),
  N = as.numeric(lr_base_sites$n),
  Observed = as.numeric(lr_base_sites$obs),
  Expected = round(as.numeric(lr_base_sites$exp), 0),
  OE2_E = round((lr_base_sites$obs - lr_base_sites$exp)^2 / lr_base_sites$exp, 0)
)

knitr::kable(
  logrank_base_table,
  caption = paste0(
    "Log-rank test for base model risk groups adjusted for tumor sites. Chi-square = ",
    round(lr_base_sites$chisq, 1),
    ", p < 2e-16."
  )
)
```

```{r}
# cox km base: no CNA
cox_km_base_nosites <- coxph(
    Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED,
    data = Analysis_static
)
```

```{r}
Analysis_static_base_nosites <- Analysis_static |>
  mutate(risk_score_base_nosites = predict(cox_km_base_nosites, type = "lp"))

risk_cutoff_base_nosites <- median(Analysis_static_base_nosites$risk_score_base_nosites, na.rm = TRUE)
Analysis_static_base_nosites <- Analysis_static_base_nosites |>
  mutate(risk_group_base_nosites = ifelse(risk_score_base_nosites > risk_cutoff_base_nosites, "High risk", "Low risk"))
```

```{r}
#| label: KM_Curve_of_base_model_without_tumor_sites
# Kaplan-Meier Curve
km_fit_base_nosites <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group_base_nosites, data = Analysis_static_base_nosites)

p4 <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit_base_nosites,
  data = Analysis_static_base_nosites,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "Risk group",
  legend.labs = c("High risk", "Low risk"),
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Survival probability",
  title = "Kaplan-Meier curves by base risk stratification (without tumor sites)",
  facet.by = "CANCER_TYPE"
) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25))

ggsave("./Figures/KM_base_nosites.png", plot = p4, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
combined_sites <- plot_grid(
  p1,
  p3,
  ncol = 1,
  #labels = c("CNA model", "Base model"),
  #label_x = 0.02,
  #label_y = 0.95,
  align = "v"
) + theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("./Figures/KM_with_tumor_sites.png", combined_sites, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: Risk-stratification-with-tumor-sites
#| fig.width: 14
#| fig.height: 10
print(combined_sites)
```


```{r}
combined_nosites <- plot_grid(
  p2, 
  p4,
  ncol = 1,
  #labels = c("CNA model", "Base model"),
  #label_x = 0.02,
  #label_y = 0.95,
  align = "v"
)

ggsave("./Figures/KM_without_tumor_sites.png", combined_nosites, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: Risk-stratification-without-tumor-sites
#| fig.width: 14
#| fig.height: 10
print(combined_nosites)
```


```{r}
CNA_df_full <- data.frame(
  X_CNA_binary, 
  check.names = FALSE
)
CNA_df_full <- cbind(SAMPLE_ID = valid_samples, CNA_df_full)
CNA_df_full$SAMPLE_ID <- as.character(CNA_df_full$SAMPLE_ID)
colnames(CNA_df_full)[-1] <- make.names(colnames(CNA_df_full)[-1])

CNA_patient_full <- clinical_sample_one |>
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
         SAMPLE_ID = as.character(SAMPLE_ID)) |>
  select(PATIENT_ID, SAMPLE_ID) |>
  left_join(CNA_df_full, by = "SAMPLE_ID")

Analysis_static_full <- clinical_patient_filtered |>
  left_join(clinical_sample_one, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  left_join(diagnosis_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  left_join(tumor_site_summary, by = "PATIENT_ID") |>
  mutate(
    Number_Tumor_Sites = ifelse(is.na(Number_Tumor_Sites), 0, Number_Tumor_Sites)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(CURRENT_AGE_DEID))

Analysis_static_full <- Analysis_static_full |>
  left_join(
    CNA_patient_full |> select(-SAMPLE_ID),
    by = "PATIENT_ID"
  )

full_gene_vars <- setdiff(colnames(CNA_patient_full), c("PATIENT_ID", "SAMPLE_ID"))

Analysis_static_full <- Analysis_static_full |>
  mutate(across(all_of(full_gene_vars), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), 0, .))) |>
  filter(!is.na(CANCER_TYPE))
```


```{r}
clinical_vars <- c("PATIENT_ID", "SAMPLE_ID", "OS_MONTHS", "OS_EVENT", 
                   "CURRENT_AGE_DEID", "GENDER", "STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED", 
                   "Number_Tumor_Sites", "CANCER_TYPE", "priority", 
                   "DIAGNOSIS_DATE", "OS_STATUS", "SAMPLE_TYPE")

cancer_types <- unique(Analysis_static_full$CANCER_TYPE)

km_by_cancer <- list()

for (cancer in cancer_types) {
  sub_data <- Analysis_static_full |>
    filter(CANCER_TYPE == cancer) |>
    filter(!is.na(OS_MONTHS), OS_MONTHS > 0, !is.na(OS_EVENT))
  
  gene_cols <- setdiff(colnames(sub_data), clinical_vars)
  gene_cols <- gene_cols[gene_cols != ""]
  
  gene_freq <- sapply(sub_data[gene_cols], function(x) mean(x == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  gene_freq <- gene_freq[gene_freq > 0]
  
  n_genes <- min(10, length(gene_freq))
  top_genes <- names(sort(gene_freq, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_genes]
  
  top_genes <- intersect(top_genes, colnames(sub_data))
  
  #cat("  Top genes:", paste(top_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  cox_fit <- coxph(
    as.formula(
      paste(
        "Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED + Number_Tumor_Sites +",
        paste(top_genes, collapse = " + ")
      )
    ),
    data = sub_data
  )
  
  sub_data$risk_score <- predict(cox_fit, type = "lp")
  cutoff <- median(sub_data$risk_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  sub_data$risk_group <- factor(
    ifelse(sub_data$risk_score > cutoff, "High risk", "Low risk"),
    levels = c("Low risk", "High risk")
  )
  
  km_fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group, data = sub_data)
  
  plot <- ggsurvplot(
    km_fit,
    data = sub_data,
    pval = TRUE,
    risk.table = FALSE,
    conf.int = FALSE,
    legend.title = "Risk group",
    legend.labs = c("Low risk", "High risk"),
    xlab = "Time (months)",
    ylab = "Survival probability",
    title = paste(cancer)
  )
  
  km_by_cancer[[cancer]] <- list(
    cancer = cancer,
    top_genes = top_genes,
    cox_model = cox_fit,
    data = sub_data,
    km_fit = km_fit,
    plot = plot
  )
}

#names(km_by_cancer)

#lapply(km_by_cancer, function(x) print(x$plot))
```

```{r}
plot_list <- lapply(km_by_cancer, function(x) x$plot$plot)

combined_plot <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = plot_list,
  ncol = 3,
  align = "hv",
  labels = LETTERS[1:5]
  #title = "Kaplan-Meier curves using cancer-type-specific top CNA features"
)

final_plot <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label(
    "Kaplan-Meier curves using cancer-type-specific top CNA features",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.98, hjust = 0.5, size = 25
  ) + draw_plot(combined_plot, y = 0, height = 0.95)

ggsave("./Figures/KM_combined_5cancers.png", final_plot, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: Cancer_type_specific_CNA_with_tumor_sites
#| fig.width: 14
#| fig.height: 10
print(final_plot)
```

```{r}
cancer_types_nosites <- unique(Analysis_static_full$CANCER_TYPE)

km_by_cancer_nosites <- list()

for (cancer in cancer_types_nosites) {
  sub_data_nosites <- Analysis_static_full |>
    filter(CANCER_TYPE == cancer) |>
    filter(!is.na(OS_MONTHS), OS_MONTHS > 0, !is.na(OS_EVENT))
  
  gene_cols <- setdiff(colnames(sub_data_nosites), clinical_vars)
  gene_cols <- gene_cols[gene_cols != ""]
  
  gene_freq <- sapply(sub_data_nosites[gene_cols], function(x) mean(x == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  gene_freq <- gene_freq[gene_freq > 0]
  
  n_genes <- min(10, length(gene_freq))
  top_genes <- names(sort(gene_freq, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_genes]
  
  top_genes <- intersect(top_genes, colnames(sub_data_nosites))
  
  #cat("  Top genes:", paste(top_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  cox_fit <- coxph(
    as.formula(
      paste(
        "Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ CURRENT_AGE_DEID + GENDER + STAGE_HIGHEST_RECORDED +",
        paste(top_genes, collapse = " + ")
      )
    ),
    data = sub_data_nosites
  )
  
  sub_data_nosites$risk_score <- predict(cox_fit, type = "lp")
  cutoff <- median(sub_data_nosites$risk_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  sub_data_nosites$risk_group <- factor(
    ifelse(sub_data_nosites$risk_score > cutoff, "High risk", "Low risk"),
    levels = c("Low risk", "High risk")
  )
  
  km_fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_EVENT) ~ risk_group, data = sub_data_nosites)
  
  plot <- ggsurvplot(
    km_fit,
    data = sub_data_nosites,
    pval = TRUE,
    risk.table = FALSE,
    conf.int = FALSE,
    legend.title = "Risk group",
    legend.labs = c("Low risk", "High risk"),
    xlab = "Time (months)",
    ylab = "Survival probability",
    title = paste(cancer)
  )
  
  km_by_cancer_nosites[[cancer]] <- list(
    cancer = cancer,
    top_genes = top_genes,
    cox_model = cox_fit,
    data = sub_data_nosites,
    km_fit = km_fit,
    plot = plot
  )
}

#lapply(km_by_cancer_nosites, function(x) print(x$plot))
```

```{r}
plot_list_nosites <- lapply(km_by_cancer_nosites, function(x) x$plot$plot)

combined_plot_nosites <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = plot_list_nosites,
  ncol = 3,
  align = "hv",
  labels = LETTERS[1:5]
  #title = "Kaplan-Meier curves using cancer-type-specific top CNA features"
)

final_plot_nosites <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label(
    "Kaplan-Meier curves using cancer-type-specific top CNA features without tumor burden",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.98, hjust = 0.5, size = 25
  ) + draw_plot(combined_plot_nosites, y = 0, height = 0.95)

ggsave("./Figures/KM_combined_5cancers_nosites.png", final_plot_nosites, width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: Cancer_type_specific_CNA_without_tumor_sites
#| fig.width: 14
#| fig.height: 10
print(final_plot_nosites)
```

```{r}
#| label: session-info
sessionInfo()
```
